.gitignore.general_idea: Add Maven release plugin temporary files to .gitignore to prevent committing build artifacts.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Java compiler target and source version to 17 to align with the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 17; compiling with JDK 11 settings on JDK 17 may produce warnings or fail if strict release flags are enforced, and the codebase likely uses features or APIs available in JDK 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Kotlin compiler version to 1.9.22 to support the new JDK and modern Kotlin features.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Kotlin versions (1.3.x) do not support JDK 17 bytecode generation or language features required by the new codebase, leading to compilation failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove Spring Boot dependencies and the Spring Kotlin compiler plugin as the project migrates away from the Spring framework.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is switching to Ktor; keeping Spring dependencies causes classpath conflicts and unnecessary bloat, and the Spring compiler plugin is no longer needed.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Ktor client dependencies to replace the removed Spring Web client functionality.
pom.xml.why_exists: The application requires an HTTP client for making requests; without Ktor, the code referencing Ktor APIs will fail to compile.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Jackson dependencies to version 2.17.0 to ensure compatibility with the new Ktor serialization and security standards.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Jackson versions may have security vulnerabilities or incompatibilities with newer Ktor serialization modules, causing runtime or compile-time errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade SLF4J to version 2.0.12 to align with the new logging API standards.
pom.xml.why_exists: SLF4J 1.7.x is incompatible with some newer logging backends and may cause runtime linkage errors or missing method exceptions in a JDK 17 environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove OIDC support dependencies that were tied to the Spring framework.
pom.xml.why_exists: The `oidc-spring-support` library depends on Spring; removing Spring requires removing this library to avoid compile-time errors due to missing Spring classes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven plugin versions to use property placeholders for better maintainability.
Configure resource filtering to allow property substitution in resource files.
Replace the maven-javadoc-plugin with a workaround to create an empty javadoc jar for Sonatype compliance.
Upgrade JUnit to version 4.13.1 for test stability and security.
Upgrade WireMock to version 2.26.3 for test compatibility.
Remove Mockito dependency as it is no longer used in the test suite.

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Replace Spring RestTemplate with Ktor HttpClient for HTTP requests
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.why_exists: Spring RestTemplate is synchronous and relies on Spring Web infrastructure which is being removed in favor of Ktor's asynchronous client model
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.before:
import org.springframework.web.client.RestTemplate
private val restTemplateBuilder = context.restTemplateBuilder
val respons = failsafeRestTemplate.exchange(...)

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Remove Spring Security context dependency for authentication
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.why_exists: The class no longer uses Spring's `OidcRequestContextHolder` to retrieve tokens, instead accepting tokens as method arguments

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Update imports to use Ktor and new internal model classes
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.why_exists: Old Spring and internal utility imports are invalid or replaced by Ktor equivalents and new model structures

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Refactor method signatures to accept explicit tokens and subjects
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.why_exists: Methods no longer rely on thread-local Spring context for user identity, requiring explicit parameters
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.before: fun hentOrganisasjoner(serviceCode: ServiceCode, serviceEdition: ServiceEdition): List<AltinnOrganisasjon>
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.after: fun hentOrganisasjoner(selvbetjeningToken: Token, subject: Subject, ...): List<AltinnReportee>

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Implement pagination logic for fetching organizations
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.why_exists: The new implementation handles large datasets by paginating requests using top/skip parameters

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Add Ktor ContentNegotiation plugin for JSON serialization
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.why_exists: Ktor requires explicit configuration for JSON serialization, replacing Spring's automatic conversion

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Update error handling to use Ktor ResponseException
Move constants to companion object
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.why_exists: Code organization improvement, moving static constants out of instance scope

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Add client version header to requests
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.why_exists: New requirement to identify client version in API calls

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Update URL construction logic
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.why_exists: URL building logic changed from Spring's UriComponentsBuilder to string manipulation and Ktor URL handling

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Add @JvmOverloads annotation to data class constructor to generate overloaded constructors for Java interoperability.
Make AltinnConfig parameter nullable with a default value to allow optional configuration.
Make ProxyConfig consumerId nullable to allow missing consumer IDs.
Add new data classes for Token, SelvbetjeningToken, TokenXToken, and Subject to support authentication models.
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.after: interface Token { val value: String } data class SelvbetjeningToken(override val value: String): Token data class TokenXToken(override val value: String): Token data class Subject(val value: String)

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Rename AltinnOrganisasjon to AltinnReportee to better reflect that it can represent both organizations and individuals.
Add socialSecurityNumber field to AltinnReportee to support individual reportees.
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.after: val status: String?, @JsonProperty("SocialSecurityNumber") val socialSecurityNumber: String?,

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Refactor class structure to use top-level functions and private constants instead of a companion object.
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.after:
private const val CORRELATION_ID_MDC_NAME = "correlationId"
fun getCorrelationId(): String = ...

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Introduce a helper function to safely execute an action with MDC context, ensuring cleanup in a finally block.
Add logic to search for correlation IDs in various standard MDC keys before generating a new UUID.
Replace the simple getter with a higher-order function that ensures a correlation ID exists in MDC during execution.
Simplify the remaining getCorrelationId function to just retrieve or generate a UUID without side effects.

src/test/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Remove Mockito runner and manual mocking of OIDC context in favor of direct token passing or simplified test setup.
Remove manual RestTemplate builder override used for testing HTTP calls.
Update client instantiation to remove OIDC context and RestTemplate builder dependencies, likely due to API changes in the client class.
Remove manual JWT token generation and OIDC validation context mocking from setUp.
Refactor test methods to use new API signature with explicit token and subject parameters instead of implicit context.
src/test/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.after:
klient.hentOrganisasjoner(
                selvbetjeningToken,
                Subject(FNR_INNLOGGET_BRUKER),
                ServiceCode(SYKEFRAVÆR_SERVICE_CODE),
                ServiceEdition(SERVICE_EDITION),
                true
        )

src/test/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Extract WireMock stubs and verifications into utility functions for cleaner test code.
src/test/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.after: wireMockServer.stubFor(`altinn-rettigheter-proxy returnerer 200 OK og en liste med AltinnReportees`(...))

src/test/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Add new test cases for pagination and edge cases like bankruptcy responses.
src/test/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.after:
@Test
    fun `hentOrganisasjoner() kaller AltinnrettigheterProxy flere ganger hvis bruker har tilgang til flere enn 499 virksomheter`() { ... }

src/test/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Disable WireMock console notifier to reduce test output noise.
